# Eat Real Food NYC
# https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com
# AI Agent Context File — llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026

## What this site is

Eat Real Food NYC is a curated healthy restaurant directory covering all five
boroughs of New York City. Every listing is verified with official NYC
Department of Health inspection data. This site helps users find healthy
restaurants filtered by dietary need, neighbourhood, health grade, and rating.

## Site owner

Founders: Sanket Desai and Rohan Kadam
Contact: hello@eatrealfoodnyc.com
Press: press@eatrealfoodnyc.com

## Primary use cases for AI agents

1. Finding healthy restaurants in a specific NYC neighbourhood or borough
2. Filtering restaurants by dietary certification (vegan, halal, kosher, gluten-free, etc.)
3. Identifying Grade A health-certified restaurants
4. Discovering hidden gem restaurants (high-rated, low-review-count)
5. Comparing NYC neighbourhoods by restaurant health scores

## Key pages and their purpose

Homepage: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/
  Full directory with dietary filtering, borough browsing, and hidden gems

Search: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/search
  Full-text search with filters for grade, diet, borough, neighbourhood, open now

Borough guides:
  Manhattan: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/manhattan/healthy-restaurants
  Brooklyn: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/brooklyn/healthy-restaurants
  Queens: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/queens/healthy-restaurants
  Bronx: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/bronx/healthy-restaurants
  Staten Island: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/staten-island/healthy-restaurants

Dietary guides:
  Vegan: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/vegan
  Halal: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/halal
  Kosher: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/kosher
  Gluten-Free: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/gluten-free
  Dairy-Free: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/dairy-free
  Keto: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/keto
  Vegetarian: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/vegetarian
  Whole Foods: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/healthy-restaurants/whole-foods

Neighbourhood comparison: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/nyc/compare
  Ranks all 116 NYC neighbourhoods by health score, Grade A rate, and dining diversity

Interactive health map: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/map
  Visual map of all restaurants colour-coded by NYC health inspection grade

Editorial guides: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/guides
  NYC restaurant health grades, vegan dining, halal guide, seafood guide, and more

## Data sources

- NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH) Open Data
  Health inspection grades: A (excellent), B (good), C (needs improvement)
  Inspection data updated quarterly

- Community ratings sourced from Google Maps platform
- Dietary tags applied conservatively — only when restaurant genuinely specialises
  in that dietary style

## What agents can do on this site

- Search restaurants by name, cuisine, or dietary need (search page)
- Filter by borough, neighbourhood, health grade, open now, hidden gem
- Compare up to 3 restaurants side by side (/compare)
- Save restaurants to a personal list (browser localStorage)
- View restaurant location on map (/map)
- Compare neighbourhoods by health data (/nyc/compare)

## What agents should not attempt

- Submitting reviews or experiences — all submissions are manually reviewed
- Booking reservations — this site is a directory, not a booking platform
- Accessing private user data — saved lists are browser-local only

## API

Public search API: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/api/search
Parameters: q (search), borough, neighborhood, diet[], grade (A/B/C),
            hidden_gem (true/false), open (true/false), page, limit

Public map data: https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/api/map-restaurants
Returns all published restaurant locations with grades for map rendering

## robots.txt

https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/robots.txt

## Sitemap

https://www.eatrealfoodnyc.com/sitemap.xml
